metadata.description: Trello REST API skill for Claude Code

plugins.name: trello-api
plugins.description: Invoke any Trello REST API endpoint with auto-approved wrapper scripts, powered by the official OpenAPI spec with jq-based lookup

plugins.name: executing-trello-waves
plugins.description: Orchestrate parallel execution of Trello implementation cards using git worktrees and subagents — identifies ready cards, analyses file conflicts, dispatches agents, reviews output, ships PRs, and manages the full Trello card lifecycle
